title: Speckle totem
description:
just a silly resource pack that replaces totem of undying with a cute Speckle plushie
this resource pack includes:
•custom model
•custom texture
•custom name
•custom subtitle text
•custom sound effect
body:
just my silly resource pack i made in 2 days and someone (hi imgrui and kel) told me to upload it here, so i did

yeah i think the pack is pretty much done, you can re-use or edit the model just by searching in the models folder and opening js file thru blockbench

oc by - YonKaGor
> 
> rename your totem to 'speckle' to turn it into plush
